description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events, ignoring changes to .gitignore and README.rst. The workflow consists of four jobs: build-package, lint, unit-test, and run-coverage, and upload-coverage. Each job runs in a containerized environment with specific dependencies and configuration. The unit-test job uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions and operating systems. The run-coverage job generates coverage reports and uploads them as artifacts. The upload-coverage job combines and uploads the coverage reports to Coveralls.
